pi_items.source: export_result.sh checks for a Maildir folder named 'unsubscribe' (or variations), matching the task description.
verifier.py explicitly scans outgoing drafts for an email addressed to 'it-admin@techcorp.org'.
verifier.py awards full points if the number of emails moved to the target folder is >= 8.
verifier.py awards full points if the moved emails correspond to >= 2 distinct mailing lists.
verifier.py awards full points if there are >= 2 unsubscribe email drafts addressed to list administrators.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world email data derived from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus. It has been verified that the evaluation logic strictly checks for the creation of an 'Unsubscribe' folder containing at least 8 moved emails representing at least 2 distinct mailing lists. The verifier also requires the drafting of at least 2 unsubscribe request emails and a notification email specifically addressed to 'it-admin@techcorp.org'.
